title: Luke Thompson - Fractional Chief AI Officer (CAIO)
description: Current profile, selected project work, and AI operations resources from Luke Thompson, fractional Chief AI Officer and co-founder of The Ops Guide.

items.title: Luke Thompson - Fractional Chief AI Officer (CAIO)
items.content_text: Luke Thompson is a fractional Chief AI Officer and co-founder of The Ops Guide, helping CEOs turn AI into ROI through strategy, automation, operating systems, and practical implementation.
items.summary: Current public profile for Luke Thompson and The Ops Guide.

items.title: The Ops Guide - Selected AI Operations Projects
items.content_text: Anonymized selected project work including AI services operating systems, Company OS and knowledge platforms, AI operations assessments, talent operations platforms, retail customer operations platforms, and training/compliance operations platforms.
items.summary: Current selected project proof for Luke Thompson and The Ops Guide.

items.title: AI Implementation Framework
items.content_text: A practical framework for AI integration in small and mid-sized businesses: readiness assessment, use-case prioritization, phased implementation, governance, and adoption planning.
items.summary: Practical AI implementation guidance from Luke Thompson and The Ops Guide.

items.title: TEDx Talk: AI and the Art of Adaptability
items.content_text: Luke Thompson's TEDx presentation on AI, adaptability, reskilling, and leadership in changing workplaces.
items.summary: Background thought leadership on AI and adaptability.
